title.rendered: Website Development Company In India | Web designing company in India

content.rendered:
Website Development Plan starting from Rs 5999/- Only

Zero to Hero: Build Website & Grow Your business

  • Custom Domain (www.mybusiness.com)
  • FREE Website Hosting
  • Business Email (abc@mybusiness.com)
  • Custom Website Design
  • Full Responsive (PC/Mobile/Tablet)
  • Contact Form
  • 7 Days Customer Support
  • Kalam Academy is in List of 100 promising startups by GOOGLE


Talk to our expert!!

Our expert will guide you how you can grow your business with Website

Look What Others Says

We Create Unique Website That Help Your Business Grow.

Our workflow is different for each of our client as every business needs special attention and a plan that will suit them the most.

CALL NOW @ +916207336455

BOOK NOW

The Sky's The Limit

We Create Unique Campaigns That Help Your Business Grow

Our workflow is different for each of our client as every business needs special attention and a plan that will suit them the most.
Free Consultancy

Get a Website That Works

Register now & Get FREE Quote

Get FREE Quote

Free Domain

Get custom .com/.net/.in etc domain in your website.

Get a website

Free Hosting

Get unmetered web space for your website.

Get a Website

Business Email

Get an email under your domain name eg help@mywebsite.com

Get a Website

Custom Design

We design website on your inputs.

Get a Website

Responsive Website

We design responsive website that work on Desktop / Mobile/ Laptop & Tablet

Learn More

Phone Support

We are available on call for your help.

Get a Website

Do you need more customers?

We develop websites that will give you more customers.

Get a Website

FAQ

where is our head office ?

We have our Main Branch located at Ranchi, Jharkhand & we serve clients all around the globe. 

Where are our clients from ?

We have client base from all over Indian Subcontinent and from rest of the world too. We don’t let boundaries decide our business.

what makes us better than our competitor ?

Kalam Academy is in List of 100 promising startups selected by GOOGLE in 2022

hOW LONG ARE WE IN THIS FIELD FOR ?

Our Team has been constantly evolving since 2014 as a start-up body but we have fully incorporated as Kalam Academy from 2016. 

WHY CHOOSE US ?

Well to be honest we can list plenty of pointers like other corporates do but Kalam Academy does not aims to be such corporate. Its a Start-Up by heart and understand the very crude emotion of its clients and deals with each of them like a family. Our Team Members constantly strive towards making your experience a tad better with every passing day.

BOOK US TODAY

Contact Details

  • Kalam Academy,
    4th Floor Rospa Tower Main Road Ranchi,
    Jharkhand
  • +916207336455
  • business@kalamacademy.org

Call Now @ +916207336455
